name: Toffee Crunch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Line two cookie sheets with parchment paper.
Sift together the flours and salt. Cream the butter in a large bowl of an electric mixer on low speed for 5 minutes. Add the sugar in two additions, beating on moderate speed for 2 minutes after each portion is added. Blend in the vanilla extract. On low speed, add the sifted mixture and mix until the flour particles are fully absorbed. Stir in the toffee and almonds. Drop heaping tablespoon-sized mounds of dough onto lined cookie sheets, spacing the mounds about 2 inches apart. Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden. Using a wide metal spatula, transfer the cookies to cooling racks after 1 minute. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
